{"query":"Palworld 1.0 update capture requirement changes experience rebalance","model":"mako","response_time_ms":771,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.pcgamer.com/games/survival-crafting/palworld-1-0-update-has-27-pdf-pages-of-changes-and-additions-says-publishing-lead/","title":"Palworld 1.0 update has '27 pdf pages of changes and additions,' says publishing lead | PC Gamer","content":"Jun 27, 2026 — Palworld 1.0 update has '27 pdf pages of changes and additions,' says publishing lead News By Justin Wagner Published June 27, 2026 … almost ...

It seems like it will be much more than a formality, too, according to a post from Pocketpair's communications and publishing head, John "Bucky" Buckley."},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/wikis/palworld/Palworld_1.0_Details_and_Patch_Notes","title":"Palworld 1.0 Details and Patch Notes - Palworld Guide - IGN","content":"Old: While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Dark.
Reduced the number of captures required to complete a Capture Bonus from 12 to 5.
Reduced the number of Pals required to reach the maximum rank (from 116 total to 48).
Greatly reduced the cost of resetting a Pal’s Soul enhancements.
Lower-level Pals will now gain experience more easily.
The number of Pal Metal Ingots required to craft an Ultimate Sphere has been reduced from 10 to 5.
Wildlife Sanctuaries are also receiving major updates to ensure that each location feels completely different than the others.
The “Repair Kit” previously required for repairing structures has been removed.
Fixed assignments can now be set from the Monitoring Stand even for sleeping Pals."},{"url":"https://cybrancee.com/blog/palworld-1-0-everything-we-know-so-far/","title":"Palworld 1.0: Everything We Know So Far","content":"Pocketpair dropped a bomb at Summer Game Fest 2026: Palworld version 1.0 launches on July 10, and they’re calling it the biggest update the game has ever had.
Within weeks, Palworld had crossed 19 million players and peaked at over 2.1 million concurrent users on Steam.
The PS5 version came out in September 2024.
By April 2026, the USPTO had rejected all 26 claims in Nintendo’s core summoning patent.
Pocketpair announced the 1.0 date at Summer Game Fest on June 5, 2026, alongside the game’s first-ever cinematic trailer.
Get your Feybreak gear sorted before July 10 because the World Tree sounds like it expects you to be ready.
You will enter a 1.0 release backed by two and a half years of updates, not the chaotic Early Access version from 2024."},{"url":"https://minestrator.com/blog/post/palworld-10-is-out-patch-notes-breakdown-and-what-changes-for-your-server","title":"Palworld 1.0 Patch Notes: Full July 10 Recap | MineStrator","content":"8 days ago — The Palworld 1.0 patch notes add two major new regions (Sunreach and the World Tree), 72 new Pals, a level cap raised from 65 to 80, two brand- ...
To go with the release, the studio published unusually massive patch notes: roughly 27 pages and more than 10,000 words, to the point that the text nearly hit Steam's character limit for announcements.
Launched in early access in January 2024, Palworld finally hits 1.0, which Pocketpair describes as the biggest update in the game's history.
If you run a custom setup, our guide on how to configure your Palworld server covers the settings that matter, our Palworld commands guide lists every admin command, and our walkthrough on how to create a Palworld server gets you from zero to online in minutes.
Server Clustering, the feature announced during the 1.0 reveal to link several instances together, does not appear in the official July 10 patch notes.
